title: autonomous approval gate — suspend and resume (runtime sequence)

messages.label: writes todos (may set status=awaiting_approval as explicit handback — DD-2)
inferActionFromContent: push/destructive only; NO architecture_change keyword (DD-3)
head todo: action.kind ∈ requireApprovalFor OR status=awaiting_approval? (DD-1)
gate hit → set state=waiting_user, stopReason=approval_required:<kind>, add to NON_RESUMABLE_WAITING_REASONS (idempotent vs existing block)
emit approval prompt on existing question/permission surface (no new transport)
loop does NOT re-stimulate model; paralysis detector defers on active gate (DD-4)
on approval: clear gate (needsApproval=false / grant recorded), resume continuation into the step
